programme.title: Saving Lives At Sea
programme.desc: Season Finale: On the Isle of Wight, the Bembridge crew face a race against time to save an old fishing trawler that’s become trapped on a submarine barrier, and is now taking on water.

programme.title: River Hunters
programme.desc: Rick Edwards and Beau Ouimette embark upon an epic search through the River Ouse, which winds its way through North Yorkshire, in a bid to find evidence that it was once home to Viking life.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: After missing the mark to connect their shafts underground, the Mifsuds call on their kids for some desperately needed help. Max and Glen battle unreliable machinery.

programme.title: NZ Hunter Adventures
programme.desc: A classic Duley family adventure through the South Westland mountains hunting tahr and chamois. Big country, big effort, and a twist no one sees coming.

programme.title: New: Saving Lives At Sea
programme.desc: The Dover crew respond to a mayday for a small boat crossing; a vessel capsizes in the English Channel, leaving over twenty people fighting for their lives in the water.

programme.title: New: Hunting Aotearoa
programme.desc: In Southland, Tiki joins Deer to Care, a group of hunters driven by both adventure and purpose—harvesting meat to support those facing food insecurity in their community.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds his old teacher's diary and learns a surprising secret. Lisa discovers an even bigger surprise.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes a successful caddy, but Marge worries it is ruining his character.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: The guys recount their first true love stories, leading to parodies of "Castaway," "Dirty Dancing" and various Meg Ryan rom-coms.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: The guys try to help Mayor Wild West reconnect with his estranged father, Old West.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter is mistaken for being a single parent, and relishes in the perks that come with it.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Meg joins the basketball team; Stewie goes down a rabbit hole of conspiracies, which ultimately ends with him developing multiple personalities.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: To restore his public image, Carter adopts a young girl from an orphanage, drawing jealousy from Lois.

programme.title: New: Hunting Aotearoa
programme.desc: In Southland, Tiki joins Deer to Care, a group of hunters driven by both adventure and purpose—harvesting meat to support those facing food insecurity in their community.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo
programme.desc: The search for game fish continues, with Sam, Jordy and Jools trying their luck in the Coromandel, before Dwane, Kieran and Broady take the reins off the Raglan coast.

programme.title: I Escaped A Murderer
programme.desc: Hear from Kala, who survived horrific torture at the hands of serial killer Todd Kohlhepp, and Tracy, who survived a horrific attack by Peter Sutcliffe, also known as the Yorkshire Ripper.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds his old teacher's diary and learns a surprising secret. Lisa discovers an even bigger surprise.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes a successful caddy, but Marge worries it is ruining his character.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Determined to make their suburban street a top spot for trick-or-treaters, Louis sets out to liven up the neighbourhood for the Huangs' first Halloween there.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: At Uncle Butch's farm, the Wolfe brothers pay a lot of money for a pair of rare nuggets of petroliana.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Dreams come true and hard work pays off when the team discovers gold in the Money Pit area.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: The Wilson sisters have a special relationship with their horses and love teaching their skills to others.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A hunter turns his hobby into a fulltime job, working from a helicopter in Fiordland.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A 38-tonne mail lorry crashes on a London street and a bashed-up Audi is wedged in a ditch on a busy country road. A former US military vehicle has been turned into a bright orange recovery machine.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: As they pick their way through Alabama, Mike and Jersey make a pit stop in historic Selma where Rex and his Aunt Amelia open the doors to their family's massive collection of vintage petroliana.S23E11.

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question: is Hilary Swank hot?

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Louis lies to Jessica and tells her that he loves her newly finished horror novel; Eddie and his friends purchase a 300-disc CD carousel to play all of their music.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus becomes a singing sensation. Homer becomes a new man. Cletus turns against his fans.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Do Pizzabots Dream Of Electric Guitars?
programme.desc: Homer tries to reunite his favourite band from his youth, but film and TV creator J.J. Abrams gets to them first.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Peter tries to take advantage of a work policy granting leave in the event of a pet's death; Stewie causes Brian to give up writing.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Lois is blocked from a vacation rental app and accused of stealing; Stewie and Brian try to sell saltwater taffy door to door.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: When Peter gets a job as the new night watchman, he and the guys turn Pawtucket Brewery into an after-hours bar; Stewie and Brian's plan to collect `lost dog' return money backfires.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: After Brian's Instagram is hacked, Meg takes Stewie and Brian to Russia, only to realize she'd rather stay there; Lois reverts to her tormented teenage self.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Season Finale: Meg gets married in Russia, but returns home after discovering she was used for a green card marriage.

programme.title: Movie: Night School
programme.desc: A group of high school dropouts is forced to attend night school in hopes that they will pass the GED exam to finish high school. Starring Kevin Hart and Tiffany Haddish..

programme.title: Twisted Metal
programme.desc: Calypso stuns the contestants with a game-changing twist.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus becomes a singing sensation. Homer becomes a new man. Cletus turns against his fans.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Do Pizzabots Dream Of Electric Guitars?
programme.desc: Homer tries to reunite his favourite band from his youth, but film and TV creator J.J. Abrams gets to them first.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Louis is featured on a regional morning talk show to promote Cattleman's Ranch. However, he worries that he failed to accurately represent his culture.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: As they pick their way through Alabama, Mike and Jersey make a pit stop in historic Selma where Rex and his Aunt Amelia open the doors to their family's massive collection of vintage petroliana.S23E11.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: A horrifying tornado rips through Missouri, wiping out 200 houses a minute. Elsewhere, one man's underwater debacle results in a remarkable rescue.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: The team is unstoppable when more evidence suggests the stone roadway is heading directly towards the Money Pit.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: Growing garlic and lavender on just a hectare of land provides Rex Hendry with most of his income.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A world record-holding shearing couple run their own shearing gang as well as other rural enterprises.
